TextEquiv.PlainText: Nathalia Alias, Woond in de raigaw Korle. -
TextEquiv.Unicode: Nathalia Alias, Woond in de raigaw Korle. -

TextEquiv.PlainText: I V=o broeder Gen Siman Fernando
TextEquiv.Unicode: I V=o broeder Gen Siman Fernando

TextEquiv.PlainText: No 23. 1. Hoerene Piannege Don Manikoe bett
TextEquiv.Unicode: No 23. 1. Hoerene Piannege Don Manikoe bett

TextEquiv.PlainText: e soon Gen=t don Siman Woont in 't dorp dienalspiettie - - -
TextEquiv.Unicode: e soon Gen=t don Siman Woont in 't dorp dienalspiettie - - -

TextEquiv.PlainText: Anna dias Woond in t dorp Biekepe
TextEquiv.Unicode: Anna dias Woond in t dorp Biekepe

TextEquiv.PlainText: Ardanelage Siman pieries bell: gen: trdoen 48
TextEquiv.Unicode: Ardanelage Siman pieries bell: gen: trdoen 48

TextEquiv.PlainText: Rieter Gen Aona anna Woont in 't dorp nendimale-
TextEquiv.Unicode: Rieter Gen Aona anna Woont in 't dorp nendimale-
